case_title: ROBERT L. SHAW et al VS. BIRKE REIMNITZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-16-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 7-2-14. ENVELOPE LABEL READS: "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,840.07 FILED BY SHAW, ROBERT L. SHAW, CINDY AS TO DEFENDANT REIMNITZ, BIRKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, ROBERT L. SHAW, CINDY AS TO DEFENDANT REIMNITZ, BIRKE
DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM. DEFENDANT DID NOT ACCEPT SERVICE OF CLAIM, DID NOT APPEAR ON COURT DATE. INCREASE IN AMOUNT OF CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, ROBERT L. SHAW, CINDY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
